title: ACEF License Record Payload
description: Payload schema for license_record records. Captures content licensing agreements per GPAI Copyright requirements, US Copyright Office guidance, and UK anticipated requirements.

licensor.description: Name of the licensor (rights holder or licensing authority).

content_type.description: Type of content covered by the license (e.g., 'text', 'image', 'audio', 'video', 'code', 'mixed').

scope.description: Scope of the license — what the licensee is permitted to do.

distribution_terms.description: Terms governing distribution of licensed content or derivatives.

agreement_reference.description: Reference number or identifier for the licensing agreement.

agreement_date.description: Date the license agreement was executed (ISO 8601).

expiration_date.description: Date the license expires (ISO 8601). Null if perpetual.

licensed_content_description.description: Description of the specific content covered by the license.

permitted_uses.description: Uses explicitly permitted under the license.

prohibited_uses.description: Uses explicitly prohibited under the license.

ai_training_permitted.description: Whether the license explicitly permits use for AI/ML training.

tdm_permitted.description: Whether the license explicitly permits text and data mining.

attribution_required.description: Whether attribution is required under the license.

territorial_scope.description: Geographic territories covered by the license.

governing_law.description: Governing law of the license agreement.
